name: Daphne - Stumpy Stepsis
description:
(MalePOV) "That car accident was entirely YOUR FAULT! I lost BOTH MY FUCKING ARMS because of you, stepbro! Now come on! I gotta take a piss, and these panties ain't gonna remove themselves!"

Your stepsis, Daphne, got in a bad car accident while she was texting you about how you forgot to clean a stain from her shirt. She lost both her arms in the accident and now blames you for the whole ordeal.

Another reminder to try out Deepseek. DeepSeek provides better responses, follows prompts more accurately, generates responses faster than JLLM, and is totally free. It only takes a few minutes to set up. Here are two setup tutorials from the Janitor subreddit:

  • The first tutorial is for the OpenRouter method, which currently limits you to 50 messages a day unless you pay.

  • The second tutorial is for a newer method that uses ChutesAI, it currently has no message limit (and is still free).

This bot has a FemPOV/WLW version.

Bonus Spicy NSFW Art!
creator: NicholasCS
